---
title: "Clinical Trials Overview"
pagetitle: "WISSPAR — Clinical Trials Overview"
---

Browse the pneumococcal vaccine clinical trials in the WISSPAR database. Each row
is one trial; the table is built live from the same immunogenicity dataset that
powers the [Graphical View](graphical-view.qmd). Search by trial number, sponsor,
or vaccine, and click a column header to sort. Trials registered on
ClinicalTrials.gov link out to their full protocol record.

```{=html}
<div class="trials-controls">
  <input id="trials-search" type="search" placeholder="Search trial, sponsor, vaccine…" aria-label="Search trials by trial number, sponsor, or vaccine" style="min-width:280px;" />
  <select id="trials-phase" aria-label="Filter by phase"><option value="">All phases</option></select>
  <select id="trials-sponsor" aria-label="Filter by sponsor"><option value="">All sponsors</option></select>
</div>
<div class="trials-count" id="trials-count"></div>
<div style="overflow-x:auto;">
<table id="trials-table">
  <caption>Pneumococcal vaccine clinical trials in the WISSPAR database</caption>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th data-key="study_id" scope="col">Trial</th>
      <th data-key="sponsor" scope="col">Sponsor</th>
      <th data-key="phase" scope="col">Phase</th>
      <th data-key="continents" scope="col">Region</th>
      <th data-key="vaccines" scope="col">Vaccines</th>
      <th data-key="nSerotypes" scope="col">Serotypes</th>
      <th data-key="assays" scope="col">Assays</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody></tbody>
</table>
</div>

<script type="module">
const DATA_URL = "data/wisspar_export.json";

function naturalSort(a, b) {
  return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: "base" });
}

function aggregate(rows) {
  const byTrial = new Map();
  for (const r of rows) {
    if (!r.study_id) continue;
    let t = byTrial.get(r.study_id);
    if (!t) {
      t = { study_id: r.study_id, sponsor: r.sponsor || "", phases: new Set(),
            continents: new Set(), vaccines: new Set(), serotypes: new Set(), assays: new Set() };
      byTrial.set(r.study_id, t);
    }
    if (r.phase) t.phases.add(r.phase);
    if (r.location_continent) t.continents.add(r.location_continent);
    if (r.vaccine) t.vaccines.add(r.vaccine);
    if (r.serotype) t.serotypes.add(r.serotype);
    if (r.assay) t.assays.add(r.assay);
  }
  return [...byTrial.values()].map((t) => ({
    study_id: t.study_id,
    sponsor: t.sponsor,
    phase: [...t.phases].sort(naturalSort).join(", "),
    continents: [...t.continents].sort().join(", "),
    vaccines: [...t.vaccines].sort(naturalSort).join(", "),
    nSerotypes: t.serotypes.size,
    assays: [...t.assays].sort().join(", "),
  }));
}

function trialLink(id) {
  return /^NCT/.test(id)
    ? `<a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${id}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${id}<span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a>`
    : id;
}

(async function () {
  const tbody = document.querySelector("#trials-table tbody");
  const countEl = document.getElementById("trials-count");
  let rows;
  try {
    const res = await fetch(DATA_URL);
    rows = await res.json();
  } catch (e) {
    countEl.textContent = "Could not load trial data.";
    return;
  }
  const trials = aggregate(rows);

  // populate filter dropdowns
  const phaseSel = document.getElementById("trials-phase");
  const sponsorSel = document.getElementById("trials-sponsor");
  [...new Set(rows.map((r) => r.phase).filter(Boolean))].sort(naturalSort)
    .forEach((p) => phaseSel.add(new Option(p, p)));
  [...new Set(trials.map((t) => t.sponsor).filter(Boolean))].sort(naturalSort)
    .forEach((s) => sponsorSel.add(new Option(s, s)));

  let sortKey = "study_id", sortDir = 1;
  const search = document.getElementById("trials-search");

  function render() {
    const q = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const phase = phaseSel.value, sponsor = sponsorSel.value;
    let view = trials.filter((t) => {
      if (phase && !t.phase.split(", ").includes(phase)) return false;
      if (sponsor && t.sponsor !== sponsor) return false;
      if (q) {
        const hay = `${t.study_id} ${t.sponsor} ${t.vaccines}`.toLowerCase();
        if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
      }
      return true;
    });
    view.sort((a, b) => {
      const av = a[sortKey], bv = b[sortKey];
      const cmp = typeof av === "number" && typeof bv === "number"
        ? av - bv : naturalSort(av, bv);
      return cmp * sortDir;
    });
    tbody.innerHTML = view.map((t) => `<tr>
      <td>${trialLink(t.study_id)}</td>
      <td>${t.sponsor}</td>
      <td>${t.phase}</td>
      <td>${t.continents}</td>
      <td>${t.vaccines}</td>
      <td>${t.nSerotypes}</td>
      <td>${t.assays}</td>
    </tr>`).join("");
    countEl.textContent = `${view.length} of ${trials.length} trials`;
  }

  document.querySelectorAll("#trials-table th").forEach((th) => {
    th.addEventListener("click", () => {
      const key = th.getAttribute("data-key");
      if (key === sortKey) sortDir *= -1;
      else { sortKey = key; sortDir = 1; }
      render();
    });
  });
  [search, phaseSel, sponsorSel].forEach((el) => el.addEventListener("input", render));
  render();
})();
</script>
```
